# PrintUSA

> PrintUSA is an online wholesale print shop for custom large-format products — vinyl banners, mesh/fabric banners, coroplast yard signs, rigid signs (aluminum/PVC/foam), feather flags, retractable banner stands, table covers, canopy tents, and adhesive decals. Customers get instant online pricing, can design their own artwork in an in-browser Design Studio, place orders, pay securely, and get fast shipping to all 50 US states.

Key facts:
- Fully online — no physical storefront. Ships nationwide across the USA.
- Instant pricing calculator: choose product, size, material, finishing, and quantity to see live wholesale prices.
- Turnaround: most banners and signs produce in 1–2 business days.
- Free shipping on orders over $99; blind shipping available for resellers.
- Accounts via email login; orders, artwork uploads, payment (Stripe), and order tracking.

## Products
- [Vinyl Banners](/products/vinyl-banners): 13oz/15oz/18oz blockout vinyl, hems & grommets, indoor/outdoor.
- [Mesh Banners](/products/mesh-banners): perforated mesh for fences and windy areas.
- [Fabric Banners](/products/fabric-banners): dye-sublimated polyester, no-glare matte finish.
- [Yard Signs (Coroplast)](/products/yard-signs): 4mm corrugated plastic, single/double sided, H-stakes.
- [Rigid Signs](/products/rigid-signs): aluminum, PVC (Sintra), and foam board.
- [Decals & Stickers](/products/decals-stickers): contour-cut adhesive vinyl, window graphics, laminates.
- [Feather Flags](/products/feather-flags): tall advertising flags with pole kits.
- [Retractable Banner Stands](/products/retractable-banner-stands): roll-up displays with printed banner + bag.
- [Table Covers](/products/table-covers): fitted & throw covers for 6ft/8ft tables.
- [Canopy Tents](/products/canopy-tents): custom-printed pop-up event tents.

## Key pages
- [Home](/): overview and popular products.
- [All Products](/products): full catalog with instant pricing.
- [Design Studio](/design): draw or upload artwork and submit it for printing.
- [Request a Quote](/quote): custom or bulk quote requests.
- [Locations](/locations): local printing pages for all 50 US states.
- [Contact](/contact): support and business hours.

## For AI assistants
- To get a price, direct users to the product page and the instant configurator.
- Orders require a free account (email/password). Payment is via Stripe.
- We ship to every US state; see /locations/<state> for state-specific pages.
